query:
UPDATE media.tv_episodes
                   SET name        = COALESCE($4, name),
                       air_date    = $5,
                       still_path  = $6,
                       overview    = $7,
                       meta_status = 'ready',
                       updated_at  = NOW()
                   WHERE show_id = $1
                     AND episode_number = $2
                     AND season_id IN (
                         SELECT id FROM media.tv_seasons
                         WHERE show_id = $1 AND season_number = $3
                     )
